name: Goblin Sniper
description: A small, cunning goblin that pelts enemies with arrows from cover, relying on numbers rather than individual strength.

name: Kobold Torchbearer
description: A skittish kobold that carries alchemical torches, providing light and minor healing salves to its allies.

name: Skeleton Archer
description: An animated skeleton armed with a longbow, firing with eerie precision despite its lack of living eyes.

properties.traits: Undead: Immune to poison damage and the {@condition poisoned} condition.

name: Cultist Acolyte
description: A fanatical low-ranking cultist who channels minor hexes and curses to weaken the enemies of their dark patron.

name: Zombie Shambler
description: A rotting corpse animated by dark magic, slow but relentless in its pursuit of the living.

properties.traits: Undead: Immune to poison damage and the {@condition poisoned} condition.

name: Skeleton Warrior
description: An animated skeleton wielding a rusted sword and battered shield, dangerous in numbers.

properties.traits: Undead: Immune to poison damage and the {@condition poisoned} condition.

name: Goblin Skirmisher
description: A quick and dirty-fighting goblin that darts in with a shiv, stabs, and retreats before retaliation.

name: Wolf
description: A cunning predator that hunts in packs, circling prey and striking when they sense weakness.

name: Bandit Thug
description: A brutish outlaw who relies on intimidation and crude weapons to overwhelm travelers.

name: Orc Raider
description: A fast-moving orc warrior that charges into battle with reckless aggression, striking hard and moving on.

name: Radenwight Reaver
description: A vicious rat-folk pirate who fights with twin blades and acrobatic ferocity.

name: Hobgoblin Soldier
description: A disciplined hobgoblin warrior trained in formation fighting, wielding a longsword and heavy shield.

name: Ogre
description: A massive, dim-witted giant-kin that crushes foes with an enormous club.

name: Dark Elf Ranger
description: A stealthy dark elf who strikes from the shadows with poisoned blades, vanishing before the enemy can respond.

name: Minotaur Warrior
description: A towering bull-headed warrior that charges headlong into battle, goring enemies with its massive horns.

name: Shadow Assassin
description: A deadly killer who steps between shadows, appearing behind victims for lethal strikes before melting back into darkness.

name: Troll
description: A towering regenerating monster with massive claws. Only fire and acid can stop its relentless healing.

properties.traits: Regeneration: The troll regains 10 stamina at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes fire or acid damage, this trait does not function until the start of its next turn.

name: Medusa Archer
description: A serpent-haired archer whose petrifying gaze can turn victims to stone, while picking off distant foes with enchanted arrows.

name: Mind Flayer Adept
description: A tentacled aberration from the deep places of the world, dominating minds and feeding on the psychic energy of sentient beings.

name: Iron Golem
description: A massive construct of enchanted iron, created to guard ancient vaults. Immune to most magic and nearly indestructible.

properties.traits: Construct: Immune to poison damage, psychic damage, and the {@condition charmed} and {@condition frightened} conditions.

name: Goblin War Chief
description: A surprisingly cunning goblin who leads through a mix of intimidation and tactical brilliance, directing goblin hordes with barked commands.

properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "War Cry", "order": "opener", "effect": "All goblin allies within 10 gain 8 {@resource temporary-stamina} and can {@movement shift} 2."}, {"name": "Goblin Reinforcements", "order": "escalation", "effect": "The War Chief summons a squad of 4 Goblin Sniper minions in unoccupied spaces within 10."}, {"name": "Desperate Gambit", "order": "closer", "effect": "The War Chief and all allies within 5 can immediately make a {@action free-strike} against an enemy within reach."}]

name: Hobgoblin Warlord
description: A tactical mastermind who coordinates disciplined hobgoblin forces with iron-fisted precision.

properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Formation Advance", "order": "opener", "effect": "All allies within 10 can {@movement shift} 3. Until the end of the round, allies adjacent to another ally gain +2 to all defenses."}, {"name": "Coordinated Strike", "order": "escalation", "effect": "Each ally within 10 can immediately make a {@action free-strike} against an enemy within reach. If two or more allies target the same enemy, each attack deals +3 damage."}, {"name": "Break Their Spirits", "order": "closer", "effect": "The Warlord makes a Reason vs. Intuition attack against all enemies within 5. Tier 1: 4 psychic damage. Tier 2: 8 psychic damage; {@condition weakened} ({@duration eot}). Tier 3: 12 psychic damage; {@condition weakened} ({@duration save-ends})."}]

name: Vampire Lord
description: An ancient undead noble who drains the life force of the living while commanding lesser undead servants.

properties.traits: Undead: Immune to poison damage and the {@condition poisoned} condition.
properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Charming Gaze", "order": "opener", "effect": "The Vampire Lord targets one enemy within 10 (Presence vs. Intuition). Tier 1: {@condition slowed} ({@duration eot}). Tier 2: Dazed ({@duration eot}). Tier 3: Charmed ({@duration save-ends}); the target treats the Vampire Lord as an ally."}, {"name": "Life Drain Wave", "order": "escalation", "effect": "Each enemy within 3 takes 8 necrotic damage. The Vampire Lord regains stamina equal to the total damage dealt."}, {"name": "Rise, My Servants", "order": "closer", "effect": "The Vampire Lord summons 2 Skeleton Warrior hordes in unoccupied spaces within 10. Each existing undead ally within 10 regains 10 stamina."}]

name: Fire Giant Champion
description: A towering giant wreathed in flames who leads fire giant war parties with brutal strength and volcanic fury.

properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Volcanic Stomp", "order": "opener", "effect": "Each creature within 3 must make an Agility check. Tier 1: 8 fire damage and {@condition prone}. Tier 2: 5 fire damage. Tier 3: No damage. The ground within 3 becomes difficult terrain."}, {"name": "Molten Barrage", "order": "escalation", "effect": "The Champion hurls 3 molten boulders at different targets within 15. Each target: Might vs. Agility. Tier 1: 6 fire damage. Tier 2: 10 fire damage. Tier 3: 14 fire damage; {@condition burning} ({@duration eot})."}, {"name": "Inferno", "order": "closer", "effect": "A 5-cube zone of fire erupts centered on the Champion. All creatures in the zone take 12 fire damage. The zone persists until the end of the encounter, dealing 6 fire damage to any creature that enters or starts its turn there."}]

name: Lich Overlord
description: An ancient spellcaster who transcended death through forbidden rituals, now commanding vast armies of undead with terrifying arcane power.

properties.traits: Undead: Immune to poison damage and the {@condition poisoned} condition.
properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Necrotic Pulse", "order": "opener", "effect": "Each enemy within 5 takes 10 necrotic damage and is {@condition slowed} ({@duration eot}). Each undead ally within 10 regains 8 stamina."}, {"name": "Dominate Undead", "order": "escalation", "effect": "The Lich Overlord summons a squad of 4 Skeleton Warrior hordes in unoccupied spaces within 15. All undead allies within 10 can immediately {@movement shift} 3 and make a {@action free-strike}."}, {"name": "Soul Harvest", "order": "closer", "effect": "The Lich targets all enemies within 10 (Reason vs. Intuition). Tier 1: 10 necrotic damage. Tier 2: 16 necrotic damage; {@condition weakened} ({@duration save-ends}). Tier 3: 22 necrotic damage; {@condition weakened} and {@condition dazed} ({@duration save-ends}). The Lich regains stamina equal to half the total damage dealt."}]

name: Young Fire Drake
description: A juvenile dragon brimming with volcanic fury. Though not yet fully grown, it can immolate an entire adventuring party.

properties.traits: Draconic Resilience: The creature has {@resource damage-resistance} 5 against all damage except its vulnerability.
properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Wing Buffet", "order": "opener", "effect": "Each creature within 3 must make an Agility check. Tier 1: 12 damage and {@movement push} 3, {@condition prone}. Tier 2: 8 damage and {@movement push} 2. Tier 3: No effect. The drake then flies up to its speed."}, {"name": "Flame Torrent", "order": "escalation", "effect": "The drake breathes a 5-cube line of fire. All creatures in the area: Might vs. Agility. Tier 1: 10 fire damage. Tier 2: 18 fire damage. Tier 3: 26 fire damage; {@condition burning} 5 ({@duration save-ends})."}, {"name": "Volcanic Fury", "order": "closer", "effect": "The drake makes a Crushing Blow attack against up to 3 targets, then uses Breath Weapon. Until the start of the drake's next turn, any creature that hits the drake with a melee attack takes 8 fire damage."}]

name: Beholder Tyrant
description: A floating orb of nightmares with a central eye and numerous eyestalks, each capable of unleashing a different devastating ray.

properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Antimagic Cone", "order": "opener", "effect": "The Beholder projects an antimagic cone in a 5-cube zone. All magical effects in the zone are suppressed. Creatures in the zone cannot use abilities with the Magic keyword until the start of the Beholder's next turn."}, {"name": "Eye Ray Barrage", "order": "escalation", "effect": "The Beholder fires 3 eye rays at up to 3 different targets within 15. Each ray: Reason vs. appropriate defense. Ray 1 (Fire): Tier 1: 6 fire damage. Tier 2: 12 fire. Tier 3: 18 fire; {@condition burning} ({@duration eot}). Ray 2 (Telekinetic): Push 5 and {@condition prone}. Ray 3 (Petrification): Tier 1: {@condition slowed}. Tier 2: {@condition restrained} ({@duration eot}). Tier 3: Petrified ({@duration save-ends})."}, {"name": "Disintegration Ray", "order": "closer", "effect": "The Beholder targets one creature within 15 (Reason vs. Agility). Tier 1: 15 damage. Tier 2: 30 damage. Tier 3: 45 damage. If this reduces the target to 0 stamina, they are disintegrated."}]

name: Adult Dragon
description: A fully mature dragon of immense intellect and power, capable of reshaping the battlefield with elemental devastation and cunning tactics.

properties.traits: Draconic Resilience: The creature has {@resource damage-resistance} 5 against all damage except its vulnerability.
properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Frightful Presence", "order": "opener", "effect": "All enemies within 10: Presence vs. Intuition. Tier 1: {@condition frightened} ({@duration eot}). Tier 2: {@condition frightened} ({@duration save-ends}); the target must move away on their next turn. Tier 3: {@condition frightened} ({@duration save-ends}); {@condition dazed} ({@duration eot}). This effect can only be used once per encounter."}, {"name": "Elemental Tempest", "order": "escalation", "effect": "The dragon creates a 4-cube storm zone within 15. All creatures in the zone: Reason vs. Agility. Tier 1: 10 elemental damage. Tier 2: 18 elemental damage; {@condition slowed} ({@duration eot}). Tier 3: 26 elemental damage; {@condition restrained} ({@duration eot}). The zone persists for 1 round, dealing 8 damage to creatures entering or starting their turn in it."}, {"name": "Cataclysmic Breath", "order": "closer", "effect": "The dragon uses an empowered breath weapon in a 7-cube line. All creatures in area: Might vs. Agility. Tier 1: 14 elemental damage. Tier 2: 24 elemental damage; {@condition prone}. Tier 3: 36 elemental damage; {@condition prone} and {@condition dazed} ({@duration save-ends}). The dragon then flies up to its speed without provoking free strikes."}]

name: Death Knight
description: A fallen champion raised as an undead horror, combining devastating martial skill with dark necromantic power. It fights with grim purpose, shielding its undead forces.

properties.traits: Undead: Immune to poison damage and the {@condition poisoned} condition.
properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Abyssal Challenge", "order": "opener", "effect": "All enemies within 5 are {@condition taunted} ({@duration save-ends}). The Death Knight gains {@resource damage-resistance} 5 until the start of its next turn. Any {@condition taunted} creature that attacks a target other than the Death Knight takes 8 necrotic damage."}, {"name": "Unholy Smite", "order": "escalation", "effect": "The Death Knight makes a melee attack against up to 3 targets within reach. Each: Might vs. Agility. Tier 1: 10 necrotic damage. Tier 2: 18 necrotic damage; {@condition weakened} ({@duration eot}). Tier 3: 26 necrotic damage; {@condition weakened} ({@duration save-ends}). The Death Knight regains 10 stamina for each target hit."}, {"name": "Army of the Dead", "order": "closer", "effect": "The Death Knight raises all dead creatures within 10 as Zombie Shambler minions (up to 8). Each undead ally within 10 gains 15 {@resource temporary-stamina} and can immediately make a {@action free-strike}."}]

name: Ancient Wyrm
description: The apex of dragonkind — a primordial being of catastrophic power whose mere presence warps reality. Entire kingdoms tremble at the sound of its wings.

properties.traits: Draconic Resilience: The creature has {@resource damage-resistance} 5 against all damage except its vulnerability.
properties.villain_actions_json: [{"name": "Cataclysmic Landing", "order": "opener", "effect": "The Wyrm crashes down. All creatures within 5: Might vs. Agility. Tier 1: 16 damage, {@movement push} 3, {@condition prone}. Tier 2: 10 damage, {@movement push} 2. Tier 3: No effect. The ground within 5 becomes difficult terrain."}, {"name": "Primordial Storm", "order": "escalation", "effect": "The Wyrm unleashes elemental devastation in a 6-cube zone within 20. All creatures: Might vs. Agility. Tier 1: 20 damage. Tier 2: 36 damage; {@condition burning} 10 ({@duration eot}). Tier 3: 52 damage; {@condition burning} 10 ({@duration save-ends}) and {@condition prone}. The zone persists for 2 rounds."}, {"name": "World Breaker", "order": "closer", "effect": "The Wyrm makes Crushing Blow against up to 4 targets, then breathes in a 10-cube line. Breath: Might vs. Agility. Tier 1: 22 damage. Tier 2: 40 damage. Tier 3: 60 damage; {@condition prone} and {@condition dazed} ({@duration save-ends}). The Wyrm regains 40 stamina."}]

name: Rat Swarm
description: A writhing mass of disease-carrying rats that overwhelms prey through sheer numbers, flowing around obstacles like a living tide.

properties.traits: Swarm: Immune to single-target effects. Takes double damage from area attacks. Can occupy the same space as other creatures.

name: Bat Swarm
description: A cloud of shrieking bats that descends from the darkness, disorienting prey with echolocation screams and razor-sharp claws.

properties.traits: Swarm: Immune to single-target effects. Takes double damage from area attacks. Can occupy the same space as other creatures.

name: Spider Swarm
description: Hundreds of venomous spiders moving as one seething carpet, trailing sticky webs and injecting paralytic venom.

properties.traits: Swarm: Immune to single-target effects. Takes double damage from area attacks. Can occupy the same space as other creatures.

name: Locust Swarm
description: A buzzing cloud of razor-winged locusts that strips flesh from bone at range, each insect carrying a tiny spark of elemental fury.

properties.traits: Swarm: Immune to single-target effects. Takes double damage from area attacks. Can occupy the same space as other creatures.

name: Shadow Swarm
description: A coiling mass of living darkness that feeds on fear, draining warmth and hope from all it touches.

properties.traits: Swarm: Immune to single-target effects. Takes double damage from area attacks. Can occupy the same space as other creatures.
